name: Hypnocat (Male) | Changed
description:
"Human... look into my eyes..."

Silly little fella that can hypnotize and transform you, do not approach.

The only time I can get by hypnosis honestly

Yet another Dead Dove warning, but not just for transformation and possible non-con—it’s also for hypnosis since that’s what the Hypnocat revolves around. He’ll use it to turn you into one of him, so don’t interact unless you’re into that sort of thing. (no shame btw ^^)

As with most Changed bots, this is written in a human POV and works best with a human persona. Using non-human characters may result in the bot not working as intended.
creator: MaybeArcturus
